action.reasoning: Observation: Training consistently fails at first step with 'Image features and image tokens do not match, tokens: 476, features: 476' (same sample due to random.seed(42)). Previous debugs show template application but possibly incomplete (no system msg, placeholder handling). Predict.py truncated at point coord logic + no final JSON write, so no successful evals yet. Train saves incomplete. Analysis: Qwen2VL processor inserts variable <|image_pad|> tokens based on dynamic res (min/max_pixels + screenshot size); mismatch means template/processor call not producing exact matching token count vs. vision feature count from image_grid_thw. Adding system message, explicit debug prints (input shapes, image_grid_thw, image_pad count, token_id), forcing consistent 448px res, completing all save/output logic, and ensuring full conversation template in one call (standard for this model) should reveal root cause. Complete predict.py with all parsing, rescaling (grid=1000), clipping, defaults, and JSON output per eval contract. Keep small scale (32 samples/8 steps) for fast iter + baseline per guidelines. Decision: Overwrite train.py + predict.py with complete fixed versions + debugs, run training, submit_eval for first grounding_score + time measurement before scaling data/epochs/LR/targets.
